---
name: 锚点新增 / 变更请求 / Anchor add or change
about: 请求新增一个可供 L2 跨 repo 引用的稳定锚点，或申报一次 slug 变更（breaking change）。Request a new stable anchor for L2 cross-repo reference, or declare a slug change.
title: "[anchor] "
labels: ["anchor", "needs-triage"]
---

> 锚点是 L2 跨 repo 引用的稳定契约。规则见 `docs/cn/anchors.md`：新增只能 append，改已登记的 slug = breaking change。
> Anchors are the stable cross-repo contract. New slugs are append-only; changing a registered slug is a breaking change.

## 类型 / Type
- [ ] 新增锚点 / New anchor
- [ ] 变更已登记 slug（breaking）/ Change an existing slug (breaking)
- [ ] 废弃锚点 / Deprecate an anchor

## 章节 / Section
<!-- 例 / e.g. Section 3 — Data Modeling & Governance-as-Code -->

## slug 与含义 / Proposed slug and meaning
<!-- 例 / e.g. `#value-heat-map` — 业务价值 × 多团队使用 的优先级热力图 -->

## 为什么需要被 L2 引用 / Why it needs to be referenceable


## 若为变更/废弃：替代项与迁移说明 / If change/deprecate: replacement & migration
